model_comparison: Both models accurately produce the content and adopt a slow, serious tone suitable for the text. However, the user explicitly requested an 'extremely slow' (极慢速) speed. Model 1 (T1) adheres to this constraint more effectively by introducing more frequent pauses (breaking after '请你') and elongating the duration of the syllables more significantly than Model 2 (T2).
